title: AN ACT DECLARING THE DAY OF MARCH OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF MUNTINLUPA TO BE KNOWN AS THE MUNTINLUPA CITY CHARTER DAY

chunks.text:
S. No. 2417 H. No. 542 / 99 OG No. 20, 3155 (May 19, 2003)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9191, February 21, 2003 ]

AN ACT DECLARING THE DAY OF MARCH OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF MUNTINLUPA TO BE KNOWN AS THE MUNTINLUPA CITY CHARTER DAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. March 1 of every year is hereby declared a special nonworking holiday in the City of Muntinlupa to be known as "Muntinlupa City of Charter Day" in order to commemorate the Charter Anniversary of the said city.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect immediately upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which is a consolidation of House Bill No. 542 and Senate Bill No. 2417 was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 28, 2003 and January 22, 2003, respectively

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: FEB 21 2003

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
